title: World Changing Opportunity T-Shirts! QR code your mental & physical stats on your body for UBI!!!

enrichment.summary: Kyle presents a hand-made t-shirt he calls the 'Opportunity Shirt,' covered in 130 color-coded grid squares on front and back representing history quiz QR codes (front/mind) and physical fitness benchmarks (back/body) that wearers fill in as they achieve personal bests. He explains the design inspiration from Roman togas, the Pantheon floor, and meritocracy, and connects the concept to UBI, democracy, and economic equality.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: a wearable meritocracy display that levels the playing field and motivates self-improvement without money
favors universal basic income as a way to give people time to improve themselves mentally and physically
rich people will hijack and corrupt merit-based systems by cheating, as Elon Musk allegedly did with video games
dismissive and critical, calling them 'ignoramuses' for behavior toward Zelensky and Russia
coded transparency is better than blunt public display — only participants can read it, reducing embarrassment
democracy arises naturally when people participate equally in shared physical/mental effort, like Athenian rowers
